center.name: 瓜伊尼亚省
center.summary: 瓜伊尼亚省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Yellow-crowned elaenia、Grey-bellied antbird、Yellow-throated antwren等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Colombia in the south-central Caquetá Department and the far eastern Guainía and Vaupés departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of the Imeri warbling antbird is found in southern Venezuela's Bolívar and Amazonas states, in Colombia from eastern Caquetá Department east through Vaupés and Guainía departments, and in extreme northwestern Brazil in the upper basin of the Rio Negro

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Another is found in the southern Venezuelan state of Amazonas and very slightly into Guainía Department in extreme eastern Colombia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The yellow-throated antwren is found in southwestern Venezuela's Amazonas state, in extreme eastern Colombia's Guainía and Vaupés departments, and in Brazil in the upper basin of the Rio Negro
